title: FloraBot/NurseryBot
description: Ornamental nurseries contain hundreds of thousands of plants across various varieties, making their counting, quality assessment and continuous management challenging. Florabot offers a solution to address these issues by tackling labor shortages, optimizing costs, and ensuring high-quality standards in nurseries

title: Ornamental Plant Nursery Inventory Management
description: Developing a multi-object tracking (MOT) algorithm to count ornamental plants in nursery efficiently. The system uses an unmanned ground vehicle equipped with multiple cameras. An ensemble model is being used as the backbone for the MOT algorithm.

title: Biponon: Tracking point-of-sale merchandise at 800,000 outlets
description: Bangladesh’s leading mobile financial service provider, bKash, has been using our trade marketing AI product, Biponon, since August 2018. Using four object detection models, bKash tracks the executions and retentions of POS materials, monitors brand campaigns, manages inventory, accurately calculates field force salary—and maintains overall market superiority in this competitive landscape. Using AI, bKash has gained a staggering 320% increase in productivity—serving 585 outlets by a merchandiser, up from 139.

title: Dharapat: CIB report and bank statement analyzers
description: IDLC Finance has been using CIB report module of our financial statement analyzer AI, Dharapat, since February 2022. The team has also been using the bank statements module since July 2023. IDLC Finance has shortened the statement processing time from three working days to less than 30 minutes. Prime Bank has signed up for the CIB report analyzer—deployment is currently in progress.

title: Burnout Sentinel
description: This project incorporates a machine learning model that generates a stress score ranging from 0 to 10. By developing a web-based system enabling users to input their physiological data, it facilitates the monitoring and management of stress levels, providing personalized suggestions. Aimed at addressing student stress in the academic environment, the project offers a comprehensive approach to stress management.

title: Sheba.XYZ Database Normalisation
description: Revamped Sheba.XYZ's database for faster query execution by documenting entity relationships, designing optimized structures, and enhancing overall efficiency.

title: Fordo: Precision marketing to convert millions of consumers
description: Unilever has been using our precision marketing AI product, Fordo, since July 2019. Built with repeat purchase data of 2.3 million unique consumers, Fordo recommends personalized product bundling and offers. Unilever team has achieved successful conversion rates of 6% and above (often as high as 13%), up from 1% before using AI.

title: Tesla Stock Price Prediction using Facebook Prophet
description: Built a Facebook Prophet Model & Forecast the stock price of Tesla 30 days into the future. Visualized data using Plotly express & Evaluate Forecast using Google Finance in Google Sheets Automated the stock forecasting process in order to get the forecast of any stock within seconds.

title: Exploratory Data Analysis with Seaborn
description: Wrote Queries to analyze big data. Visualized query results with data studio. Saved, created report and shared work

title: HaateKhori
description: This is a project that is intended to help the child and their parents in their education. There are mainly three types of features: learn to write, know your surroundings, and know you. Learn to write by helping in writing Bangla and English characters and numbers. In knowing your surroundings, the child will learn and identify different shapes and objects. Know your feature is to help a child in learning and identifying relatives and body parts.
